summary: Iteration 20: Verified 'You may also like' related products (ProductDetail, Products, Cart) and admin-managed homepage Campaign Banner. All 6 backend pytest cases PASS and all frontend flows render with the correct data-testids and positions.

issues: Campaign banner is rendered AFTER <RecentlyViewed /> section, not directly between gender-grid and Best Sellers. When a returning visitor has recently-viewed items, banner appears below them. Visually still before Best Sellers, so requirement is technically met, but ordering is 'gender-grid -> RecentlyViewed -> campaign-banner -> best-sellers'. If strict placement is desired, move campaign banner above <RecentlyViewed /> in /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx.

Only file-upload input is exposed for the banner image (data-testid='campaign-image-input' / 'campaign-image-replace-input' are hidden <input type=file>). No URL-text input option. Not a functional blocker since file upload works, but automation tests cannot set an image via URL through the UI.

action_items: (Optional) Move Campaign Banner section above <RecentlyViewed /> in Home.jsx to match spec of placement immediately after gender-grid.
(Optional) Consider also exposing a URL text input alongside the file upload for campaign banner image to allow quick admin edits without file upload.
critical_code_review_comments: products.py get_related_products: `_id` in seen_ids is an ObjectId, but base_query['_id'] = {'$nin': list(seen_ids)} is passed a list of ObjectIds correctly; verified via tests.
PUT /api/products/{id} correctly accepts related_product_ids via ProductUpdate model and persists; GET returns it. Manual picks take priority as expected.
POST /api/products/related-bulk correctly excludes all input product_ids and falls back FBT -> brand -> category.
homepage.py PUT /campaign-banner returns 401/403 for unauth requests; verified. GET /settings always returns campaign_banner object even when not set (default shape).
seed_data_creation: None. Test mutated one product's related_product_ids and campaign_banner transiently, then restored to originals / disabled banner.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Related products data-testids: (ProductDetail) [data-testid='related-products-grid'], (Products page) [data-testid='products-you-may-also-like'] wrapper + [data-testid='products-you-may-also-like-grid'] inner, (Cart) [data-testid='cart-you-may-also-like'] + [data-testid='cart-you-may-also-like-grid']. Home campaign banner: [data-testid='campaign-banner-section'], [data-testid='campaign-banner-title'], [data-testid='campaign-banner-description'], [data-testid='campaign-banner-cta']. Admin: [data-testid='campaign-banner-manager'], toggle 'campaign-enabled-toggle', text inputs 'campaign-title-bg'/'-en', 'campaign-description-bg'/'-en', 'campaign-button-text-bg'/'-en', 'campaign-button-link', save 'save-campaign-banner-btn'. Image is FILE input only (hidden). To test frontend rendering, set image via PUT /api/homepage/campaign-banner after login. On /login route the page is blank—there is no dedicated login page; use POST /api/auth/login to set cookies then navigate to /admin.
